title: Relics of Rain
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/xStOrVN.png)

Have you ever wanted to play Minecraft with items inspired by your favorite game? Look no further!

**Relics of Rain** is an addon to the [Relics mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod) that introduces items inspired by the hit game series _Risk of Rain_. ![bungus](https://github.com/catboybinary/relicsofrain_assets/raw/refs/heads/main/bungus.webp) **Explore new surface structures** that resemble the ruins of a spaceship (and discover exciting new items hidden inside!) ![frost relic](https://github.com/catboybinary/relicsofrain_assets/raw/refs/heads/main/frost_relic.webp) Want to contribute to the mod? Feel free to report bugs or suggest features on my [GitHub page](https://github.com/catboybinary/Relics-of-Rain). see ya there! :P ![ukulele](https://github.com/catboybinary/relicsofrain_assets/raw/refs/heads/main/ukulele.webp)
